llcFilesWith: Montana Secretary of State (Application for Registration of Assumed Business Name)
soleProprietorFilesWith: Montana Secretary of State (the same statewide assumed business name registration applies to individuals and sole proprietors)
feeBasis: The Secretary of State fee to register an assumed business name is $20, and renewal is also $20.
renewalRule: A registration is effective for five years from the date of registration (§ 30-13-206) and may be renewed for successive five-year terms.
protectionNote: An assumed business name must be distinguishable on the record from names already registered or reserved with the Secretary of State (§ 30-13-202), so registering one blocks a later identical assumed name, but the registration is disclosure rather than a trademark and grants no exclusive right beyond that screen.
searchNote: Registered assumed business names appear in the Secretary of State's online business search.
notes: Montana registers assumed business names statewide with the Secretary of State (Mont. Code Ann. Title 30, ch. 13, part 2). LLCs and sole proprietors alike register for $20; the registration lasts five years and renews for like terms. The name is screened for distinguishability against registered and reserved names, so it blocks a later identical assumed name, but it grants no exclusive right and needs no publication.
